# Yes365 Car Rentals

> Toyota hybrid car rentals for Uber and DiDi drivers in Sydney, Australia. Unlimited kilometres, rideshare insurance and full maintenance included. Pick up in Tempe NSW — on the road within 24 hours. Foreign licences accepted.

## Pages

- [Fleet & Pricing](https://yes365.au): Toyota Camry 50 from $200/week, Corolla from $250/week, Camry 70 from $300/week, RAV4 from $350/week — all Uber-approved hybrids
- [How It Works](https://yes365.au): Book online or WhatsApp, bring your licence and proof of address, sign and drive the same day
- [FAQ](https://yes365.au): Licences, insurance, documents, swaps and the free-week promotion
- [Contact](https://yes365.au): 2 Holbeach Ave Tempe NSW 2044 · +61 456 555 415 · info@yes365.au

## Optional

- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/61456555415): Chat directly with the Yes365 team to book or ask questions
